title: eriostemon myoporoides subsp. leichhardtii
intro: Eriostemon myoporoides subsp. leichhardtii, also known as Leichhardt's honeysuckle, is a species of flowering plant in the Rutaceae family, native to eastern Australia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, with a history of use by indigenous Australians to treat various ailments. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to offer health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, Leichhardt's honeysuckle has been used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
